label_this_application_is_designed_to_en: [PT] This application is designed to enhance your conditioning experience.
label_features_unlock_as_you_level_up_th: [PT] Features unlock as you level up through use. Start the engine and let the conditioning begin!
label_button_in_the_top_bar_for_a_full_t: [PT] button in the top bar for a full tutorial
label_hover_over_any_setting_to_see_what: [PT] • Hover over any setting to see what it does
label_add_videos_to_assets_videos_and_im: [PT] • Add videos to 'assets/videos' and images to 'assets/images'
label_for_gaming_use_borderless_windowed: [PT] • For gaming: Use 'Borderless Windowed' mode for overlays
label_running_many_features_especially_w: [PT] Running many features, especially with high frequencies or large media, can be resource-intensive.
label_if_you_experience_performance_issu: [PT] If you experience performance issues on low-end PCs, consider reducing active features.
msg_restart_to_apply: [PT] Restart the app to fully apply the new language
skill_err_login_required: [PT] Please log in to purchase enhancements.
achievement_plastic_initiation_flavor: [PT] Welcome to the dollhouse. You're just getting started.
achievement_dumb_bimbo_flavor: [PT] We're losing some IQ points, right Bambi?
achievement_fully_synthetic_flavor: [PT] More plastic than flesh. Your transformation is becoming permanent.
achievement_docile_cow_flavor: [PT] Moo~ Such a good, obedient cow. Content to graze and be milked.
achievement_perfect_plastic_puppet_flavo: [PT] And you thought it was just a game, uh?
achievement_brainwashed_slavedoll_flavor: [PT] Your mind belongs to the conditioning now. There's no going back.
achievement_platinum_puppet_flavor: [PT] The ultimate achievement. You've transcended into pure, devoted obedience.
achievement_rose_tinted_reality_req: [PT] Keep the Pink Filter active for 10 cumulative hours
achievement_rose_tinted_reality_flavor: [PT] The world just looks better this way, doesn't it?
achievement_deep_sleep_req: [PT] Complete a session lasting longer than 3 hours
achievement_deep_sleep_flavor: [PT] Who needs the real world anyway?
achievement_daily_maintenance_req: [PT] Launch the app 7 days in a row
achievement_retinal_burn_flavor: [PT] Close your eyes. You can still see them, can't you?
achievement_morning_glory_flavor: [PT] Starting the day on the right frequency.
achievement_sofa_decor_flavor: [PT] You're just a pretty accessory for the furniture now.
achievement_look_but_dont_touch_req: [PT] Complete Good Girls Don't Cum with Strict Lock
achievement_look_but_dont_touch_flavor: [PT] Frustration is just another word for devotion.
achievement_spiral_eyes_req: [PT] Stare at the Spiral Overlay for 20 minutes
achievement_spiral_eyes_flavor: [PT] Round and round it goes, where your mind went, nobody knows.
achievement_mathematicians_nightmare_req: [PT] Guess correct bubble count 5 times in a row
achievement_mathematicians_nightmare_fla: [PT] You're surprisingly good at counting for an airhead.
achievement_pop_the_thought_flavor: [PT] Every pop is a thought disappearing.
achievement_typing_tutor_flavor: [PT] Good muscle memory. Your fingers know what to say.
achievement_obedience_reflex_req: [PT] Complete Lock Card (3 phrases) in under 15 seconds
achievement_obedience_reflex_flavor: [PT] You didn't even read it, you just typed. Speed is a sign of devotion.
achievement_mercy_beggar_flavor: [PT] Too dumb to focus? Time for a penalty.
achievement_clean_slate_req: [PT] Let Mind Wipers run for 60 seconds
achievement_clean_slate_flavor: [PT] Squeaky clean. No thoughts, just shine.
achievement_corner_hit_req: [PT] Watch Bouncing Text hit the exact corner
achievement_corner_hit_flavor: [PT] The most exciting thing that happened all day.
achievement_neon_obsession_req: [PT] Click on the Avatar 20 times rapidly
achievement_neon_obsession_flavor: [PT] Hey! I'm just a drawing... or am I?
achievement_what_panic_button_req: [PT] Complete any session with Disable Panic enabled
achievement_what_panic_button_flavor: [PT] There is no escape, and you love it.
achievement_relapse_req: [PT] Press ESC to stop, then restart within 10 seconds
achievement_relapse_flavor: [PT] You got scared, but you came running right back. You need this.
achievement_total_lockdown_req: [PT] Activate Strict Lock, No Panic, and Pink Filter together
achievement_total_lockdown_flavor: [PT] The Danger Combination. Brave... or foolish?
achievement_system_overload_req: [PT] Have Bubbles, Bouncing Text, and Spiral all active
achievement_system_overload_flavor: [PT] Too much input. Brain.exe has stopped working.
skill_pink_hours_desc: [PT] Shows total conditioning time across all sessions
skill_pink_hours_flavor: [PT] Like, how long have you been getting all pink and pretty? Every second makes your brain more bubbly~
skill_ditzy_data_desc: [PT] Unlocks statistics panel with session data
skill_ditzy_data_flavor: [PT] Numbers are like, SO hard... but these ones are pretty! See all your bimbo stats in one adorable place~
skill_sparkle_boost_1_desc: [PT] +10% XP from all sources. Adds pink glow to flashes and sparkle particles on bubble pops
skill_sparkle_boost_1_flavor: [PT] Good girls deserve extra sparkles! You're just THAT special, sweetie~
skill_good_girl_streak_desc: [PT] Enhanced streak display + 1 weekly streak shield
skill_good_girl_streak_flavor: [PT] Being obedient every single day? That deserves protection! One free oopsie per week~
skill_hive_mind_flavor: [PT] See how many other bimbos are conditioning RIGHT NOW! You're never alone in your journey to empty~
skill_trophy_case_flavor: [PT] Look at all your pretty accomplishments! Longest session, biggest streak... you're doing SO well!
skill_sparkle_boost_2_desc: [PT] +15% more XP (stacks to 25%). Stronger pink glow on flashes
skill_sparkle_boost_2_flavor: [PT] Even MORE sparkles?! +15% extra (25% total!) You're practically GLOWING~
skill_lucky_bimbo_desc: [PT] 5% chance for 10x XP on flash images with golden pulsing glow
skill_lucky_bimbo_flavor: [PT] Being an airhead pays off sometimes! 5% chance any flash gives 10x XP~ Tee-hee!
skill_milestone_rewards_flavor: [PT] Good girls who show up every day deserve a treat~ The longer your streak, the bigger your daily welcome bonus!
skill_oopsie_insurance_desc: [PT] Restore broken streak for 500 XP (once per season)
skill_oopsie_insurance_flavor: [PT] Everyone forgets sometimes, silly! Pay 500 XP to fix a broken streak once per season~
skill_popular_girl_flavor: [PT] OMG find out how pretty you are compared to everyone! Top X%... are you the PRETTIEST?
skill_quest_refresh_flavor: [PT] Don't like your quest? Swap it for free once a day! Good bimbos get choices~
skill_better_quests_flavor: [PT] Your rerolled quests are extra rewarding now! +25% XP on any quest you refresh~
skill_sparkle_boost_3_desc: [PT] +20% more XP (stacks to 45%). Maximum pink glow on flashes
skill_sparkle_boost_3_flavor: [PT] THE MOST SPARKLES POSSIBLE! +20% more (45% total!) You're basically made of glitter now~
skill_lucky_bubbles_desc: [PT] 5% chance for 20x bubble points with golden sparkle burst
skill_lucky_bubbles_flavor: [PT] Pop pop POP! 5% chance bubbles give 20x points! Empty heads LOVE bubbles~
skill_pink_rush_flavor: [PT] Random 60-second PINK EMERGENCY! 3x XP while your brain goes completely cotton candy~
skill_streak_power_flavor: [PT] Each day you're good adds +0.5% XP! At 30 days that's +15%! Consistency is SO hot~
skill_reroll_addict_flavor: [PT] Can't stop rerolling? Now you have 2 EXTRA rerolls every day! Spin spin spin~
skill_perfect_bimbo_week_desc: [PT] 3000/6000/10000 XP at 7/14/30 day streaks (scales with level +2%/lv)
skill_perfect_bimbo_week_flavor: [PT] Presents for persistent princesses! Earn huge XP bonuses at 7, 14, and 30 day daily quest streaks! ✨
skill_night_shift_flavor: [PT] Good bimbos condition when they should be sleeping~ The pink thoughts never stop!
skill_early_bird_bimbo_flavor: [PT] Starting your day with programming? Morning conditioning hits DIFFERENT~
skill_eternal_doll_desc: [PT] Shows lifetime stats across all seasons
skill_eternal_doll_flavor: [PT] Your dedication is FOREVER. Lifetime stats that never reset... you've always been a bimbo~
quest_mindless_minutes_d_desc: [PT] Spend 20 minutes with any overlay active
label_enhancement_tree_subtitle: [PT] you earn sparkle points from leveling up + every 100 bubbles popped~
label_enhancement_tree_warning: [PT] once you pick a path, there's no going back~
msg_companion_level_required:
[PT] {0} unlocks at Level {1}.

You're currently Level {2}. Keep training to unlock!
